title: stachys marrubiifolia
intro: Stachys marrubiifolia, also known as Marrubium, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, it possesses anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which can help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs. The health benefits of Stachys marrubiifolia include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and ease respiratory congestion. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
